response.overview: Kwetu follows the lives of a typical family household in the ghettoh where Baba Boi,the head of the family drives his wife Mama Boi and kids,Boi and Dota into constant pain whenever he is drunk. After loosing his only source of income that he dearly loved during the pandemic,Baba Boi has been living a miserable life as a drunkerd while stealing his wife's hard earned money to quench his thirst. Mama Boi remains to be the only sole breadwinner as she struggles to put food on the table for her children and at the same time act as her kid's source of strength considering what they go through at the mercy of Baba Boi.
response.title: Kwetu
